summary: Final verification of Hönsgården UX improvements - Iteration 22. Fixed datetime bug in AI daily report endpoint. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified all new features working.

fixed.issue: TypeError comparing offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes - fixed by adding timezone handling for MongoDB datetime values

notes: Veckans bästa höna card only appears when best_hen_week data exists (requires eggs registered)
Community comparison card requires total_users > 1 to display
Health Score badge visible on Hens page (67 score shown)
TAP +1 badge visible and clickable on egg card

one_tap_egg_registration.details: TAP +1 badge visible on egg card, clicking adds 1 egg immediately with confirmation banner and Undo option

best_hen_week.details: Backend API returns data correctly, frontend card shows when best_hen_week has data

community_comparison.details: Backend API returns data correctly, frontend card shows when total_users > 1

free_ai_report.details: Backend API /api/ai/daily-report working after datetime fix, returns free_report_available and days_until_free for non-premium users

hen_health_score.details: Backend API /api/hens/health-scores working, frontend shows health score badge (67) on each hen

statistics_trends.details: Statistics page shows trend analysis section (locked for premium), graph area ready for data

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed datetime timezone comparison on line 5927
seed_data_creation: Used existing test hen (TestHöna) and added 1 egg via one-tap feature for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new UX features verified working. Best hen and community comparison cards are conditional based on data availability. DateTime bug in AI daily report endpoint was fixed.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: AI daily report endpoint returning 500 Internal Server Error
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: MongoDB stores datetime without timezone info (naive), but code compared with timezone-aware datetime causing TypeError
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added timezone handling - check if used_at.tzinfo is None and add UTC timezone before comparison
